title: Red Sweep Attack
description: Changes the normal sweep hit with an cool red effect
body:
Changes the sweep attack effect to red for a better visibility and it looks also better.



Compatible with most other packs.


If you have any questions, feedback, or personal inquiries of any kind, feel free to join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/kX5NjxndyY) server. There, you can use the ticket system to contact me directly.
